title: lemphoria humistrata
intro: Lemphoria humistrata, also known as the Yellow Formosa, is a species of plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to tropical Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and pain, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiviral properties. Lemphoria humistrata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
